package: Finite QEC toy model satisfying a de Sitter-like observer-patch diagnostic gate

proof_obligations.claim: Observer patches overlap exactly on a finite shared horizon.
Named patch entropy, overlap, MI/CMI/I3, and shared-horizon algebra agree.
Observer reconstruction algebra differs between the two code realizations.
Overlapping observer patches and exact QEC complementarity guard against a disjoint-copy interpretation.
Private-shell, shared-horizon, observer-patch, and survivor erasure semantics are exactly certified.
Exact rational channels and robust channel synthesis preserve certified horizon fixed-point semantics while transition behavior varies.
proof_obligations.command: python3 -m qgtoy cosmology-phase22 && python3 -m qgtoy cosmology-phase27 --max-bonus 2

proof_obligations.claim: The strict-cover bounded search distinguishes certified strict hits from entropy near-misses rejected by erasure semantics.

not_overclaimed: No literal continuum de Sitter claim.
No asymptotic family theorem beyond the existing balanced-bridge CSS family.
